Terms of Service

Last updated: July 2026.

Acceptance

By using this site and its services, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the services.

Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You are responsible for activity that occurs under your account. Notify the project if you believe your account has been compromised.

Acceptable use

  • Do not attempt to disrupt, overload, or gain unauthorized access to the services or related systems.
  • Do not use the services to transmit unlawful, abusive, or infringing content.
  • Do not circumvent rate limits, captcha, or other access controls.

Availability

The services are provided as-is and as-available. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features at any time without notice.

Content and intellectuall property

Project code is released under its respective open source license (see the MIT LICENSE in this repository). Trademarks and names remain with their owners.

Third-party services

The sign-in flow relies on hCaptcha for bot protection. Your use of that component is subject to hCaptcha's own terms and privacy policy.

Changes

We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be directed to the Palmshed project maintainers via the organization's GitHub repository.

© 2026 Palmshed
